subject: codex-project-governor
project_context: The project needs better upgrade decisions, release research, memory governance, and subagent-based audits.

candidate_versions.title: Version researcher
candidate_versions.summary: Adds release research before upgrade advice, including skipped-version distance, evidence quality, relevance mapping, and user choice gates.
changes: Adds version-researcher skill for release note analysis before upgrades.
Adds release research policy and report templates.
Connects research output to upgrade-advisor decisions.

risks.description: Advisory-only workflow; no manifest or lockfile edits.

evidence.summary: Release adds version research and upgrade evidence workflow.

candidate_versions.title: Governance runtime
candidate_versions.summary: Preview of a stricter governance runtime with hook orchestration and default blocking checks.
changes: Adds stricter blocking rules for upgrade and implementation workflows.
breaking_changes: Projects must explicitly opt in to hook enforcement config.
Some previous advisory checks become blocking by default.
migration_steps: Re-run init-existing-project to regenerate governance files.

risks.description: Breaking governance defaults may block existing workflows.
